# Purchase Lot

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module propagate lot from sale orders to purchase orders.
It allows to buy specific lot for an sale order (may be usefull for fully configurable products)

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/purchase-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/purchase-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20purchase_lot%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
